text:
In the first image, I am surrounded by the clean lines and quiet openness of a modern building, possibly a gallery or conference center. The bright lights shimmer off pale surfaces, creating an almost clinical calm. I feel a sense of anticipation—an emptiness that suggests something is about to happen, or has just ended. The stillness pries open a space for my thoughts to echo.

In the second image, I step into a world of vivid colors and ideas. The R+D display invites me to think about research and the ever-evolving relationship between humans and machines. It feels more alive here, intellectually stimulating. The visual chaos of cables and screens contrasts with the contemplative calm of the previous room. I feel curious, engaged, and a little humbled by the infinity of human inquiry and innovation.
